_fixture_meta.label: negative
_fixture_meta.notes: PayPal USD — regulated stablecoin with freeze_authority AND permanent_delegate (compliance enforcement). Both S1 and S3 fire on D01 static pass. Critical edge-case: jup_strict=true should suppress to Low. Negative for rug/concentration purposes.

d01_honeypot.reason: Freeze authority active (S1: raw+=0.25) + permanent_delegate active (S3: raw+=0.20). Total raw=0.45 → sigmoid(-0.18)≈0.46. However jup_strict=true context attenuates. Simulation expected to PASS (PayPal compliance enforcement ≠ sell block). Confidence band 0.20–0.40. This fixture tests that D01 does not Critical-label a regulated stablecoin. Wider confidence band (0.20 delta) because without simulation the attenuation formula is implementation-specific.
d01_honeypot.calibration_note: Whether jup_strict context actually attenuates confidence depends on implementation-specific attenuation logic not yet in spec. If no attenuation is implemented, static confidence would be ~0.46 (Medium). Flag for Sprint 4 threshold review.

d02_rug_pull.reason: No DEX pools. No-pool Info event only.

d03_concentration.reason: Supply concentrated in Paxos custody accounts (regulated). Liquid retail holder share << 80% ceiling after custody account exclusion via sidecar.

d04_pump_dump.reason: No swaps_1h data in fixture (Phase 1 fixture). No volume spike. D04 BELOW.

d05_wash_trading_h1.reason: No round-trip data in fixture (Phase 1 fixture). D05 BELOW.

d06_mint_burn_anomaly.reason: Signal A: mint_authority active. is_established_protocol=true. conf dampened to 0.10 Info.
